site.name: RankRadar
site.tagline: Real-time visibility of GitHub trending, AI models, and OpenRouter consumption
site.poweredBy: Powered by GitHub Search, Artificial Analysis & OpenRouter

home.intro: Three rankings in one view. Data refreshed daily from official APIs.
home.sectionGithubDesc: Top-starred repos by time window (1d / 7d / 30d / 90d / all-time).
home.sectionModelsDesc: Rankings by intelligence, coding, math, speed, pricing (543 models on Artificial Analysis).
home.sectionOpenRouterDesc: Most-used apps by tokens and requests — popular and trending.

github.title: GitHub Top by Window
github.subtitle: Top-starred repos — 1d, 7d, 30d, 90d, and all-time windows.
github.caveat: "Top new by window" measures popularity among newly-created repos — not trending with deltas (that would need historical snapshots in DB). Same as github.com/trending.

models.title: Top AI Models
models.subtitle: The three primary indices from Artificial Analysis (Intelligence, Coding, Agentic) plus extended views from the same official dataset (LLM Leaderboard, Top by Task, Fastest).
models.creator: Creator

openrouter.title: Top OpenRouter Apps & Models
openrouter.subtitle: Apps with most tokens consumed and most trending + rankings from the public model catalog.

explainer.heading: Why apps, not models
explainer.models_vs_apps: OpenRouter exposes public rankings at the app level, not the model level. An app (e.g. Kilo Code, OpenClaw, Hermes Agent) consumes tokens from many models at once. Rankings of individual models by token usage or trending are not publicly available via API — they could only be estimated by aggregating each app's consumption to its models, which OpenRouter does not expose.
explainer.popular_vs_trending: Popular = all-time cumulative total. Trending = fastest-growing apps/models in the recent window (~1 month). By tokens = absolute ranking by total tokens consumed. All three measure different dimensions.
explainer.recent_note: Most recent = newest models in the public OpenRouter catalog, ordered by creation date. Not a usage ranking; an honest derived view from the /v1/models endpoint.
explainer.official_link: Official model rankings (not public via API):

compare.subtitle: Pick up to 3 models and compare intelligence, coding, agentic, pricing and context window side-by-side.
